title: Copycat Panera Broccoli Cheese Soup
description: A rich, cheesy broccoli soup with carrots and cheddar, thickened to a creamy texture — just like the Panera classic.

items: ½ cup diced onions (yellow or white)
1 cup shredded carrots (matchsticks cut into half-inch pieces)
Pinch of crushed red pepper flakes (or more as desired)

instructions: In a large pot over medium-high heat, melt the butter. Add in the onions, carrots, and broccoli. Cook to soften, about 5 minutes (more or less depending on the size you cut the vegetables).

Slowly add in the broth, milk, and cream. Sprinkle with flour and add the salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes. Continue stirring and heating over medium heat until thickened. This will take about 10-15 minutes.
Once thick, add the cheese and stir until melted and smooth. Serve soup and enjoy!
